profile.name: Sujit Gajare
profile.title: Senior Frontend Developer (Angular)
profile.summary: Senior Frontend Developer with 4+ years of experience building scalable enterprise web applications using Angular. Strong expertise in micro-frontend architecture, performance optimization, and API integration. Experienced in CI/CD automation and improving application stability in production environments. Hands-on exposure to React fundamentals, including functional components and hooks, with the ability to adapt quickly across frontend frameworks in Agile teams.

projects.name: My Plan Manager [Vanguard Enterprise Financial Platform]

achievements.heading: Quality Assurance Improvement
achievements.description: Increased unit test coverage from 55% to 85% using Jasmine and enforced automated quality gates through SonarQube.

achievements.heading: Performance Optimization
achievements.description: Improved core application performance, achieving a 30% reduction in initial page load time.

achievements.heading: Awards
achievements.description: Awarded multiple Rise and Insta Awards at Infosys for delivery excellence, innovation, and consistent high performance on enterprise projects.
